role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no script visible) and abstained from assessment.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and settlement patterns consistent with the Bengal Delta.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the country as Bangladesh. The agents provided grounded, image-specific evidence (water hyacinth, auto-rickshaw design, corrugated metal structures) and correctly navigated the difficulty of distinguishing Bangladesh from West Bengal, India, by leaning on specific infrastructural and vehicle details.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of flat terrain, water hyacinths, and corrugated metal structures match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Identified water hyacinth and mango trees which are clearly visible.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the auto-rickshaw and road shoulders.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Vehicle and building descriptions align with the visual evidence.
